rationale: The cited paper appears only as a brief supporting reference, first in an introductory list about why marketers care about family decision processes and later in a grouped citation about possible preference revision in discussion. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses, model specification, measurement approach, or empirical tests on this specific study. Its core theoretical and methodological development centers on coercive versus noncoercive influence dynamics and postdecision effects, drawing foundation mainly from other sources.
